hero.title: Cookie Policy
hero.subtitle: At SustainSoft, we use cookies and similar technologies to improve your browsing experience and provide personalized content. This policy explains what cookies we use and how you can manage them.

sections.title: 1. What are cookies?
sections.content: Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device when you visit a website. These cookies allow the site to remember your actions and preferences over a period of time, so you don't have to re-enter them each time you return to the site or navigate between pages.

sections.title: 2. Types of cookies
sections.intro: There are different types of cookies based on their purpose and duration:

items.text: **Technical cookies:** These are essential for the website to function and cannot be disabled. They include features like page navigation and access to secure areas.
**Preference cookies:** Allow the website to remember information that changes the way the site behaves or looks, such as your preferred language or region.
**Analytics cookies:** Help us understand how visitors interact with the website by collecting and reporting information anonymously.
**Marketing cookies:** Used to track visitors across websites to display relevant and engaging ads.

sections.title: 3. Cookies we use
sections.intro: At SustainSoft, we use the following categories of cookies:

cards.title: Essential cookies
cards.desc: Necessary for the basic functioning of the site, such as authentication and security.

cards.title: Performance cookies
cards.desc: Help us improve website performance by identifying errors and loading issues.

cards.title: Functional cookies
cards.desc: Enable enhanced functionalities like embedded videos and user preferences.

cards.title: Analytics cookies
cards.desc: We use Google Analytics to understand traffic and improve our services.

sections.title: 4. Managing cookies
sections.intro: You can control and manage cookies in various ways:

steps.title: Browser settings
steps.desc: Most browsers allow you to view, manage, delete, and block cookies through their privacy settings.

steps.title: Preferences panel
steps.desc: You can access our cookie panel at any time to modify your consent preferences.

steps.title: Third-party tools
steps.desc: There are browser extensions and tools that allow you to manage cookies centrally.

contact.title: 5. Policy changes
contact.subtitle: We may update this cookie policy occasionally to reflect changes in the technologies we use. If you have questions about our cookie policy, please don't hesitate to contact us.
